result:
F7 repair round complete — **commit `0c7c26d`** (pushed, isolated to 8 B-owned files). All four items done, code/static only (no GPU/Slurm/C++/G2/P3F/nominal/replicas/covariance).

**1 — Durability tests + validator:** `validate_coherent_bootstrap` now fails closed on background factor tamper, background-indices/order tamper, omitted `n_bkg_full`, omitted background order evidence, and background inventory-hash mismatch. `test_global_before_subset` now asserts exact **data + signal + background** global-before-subset replay; `test_no_nominal_refinement_reuse` intact.

**2 — Receipts (PG0 handled):** appended the F7 EVIDENCE-BLOCKED entry to `nd-unfolding/ND_OMNIFOLD_RUN_LOG.md` (clean) + `PET_P1_P5_SESSION_STATE.md`. **PG0 blocker reported:** canonical `ND_OMNIFOLD_STATUS.md` is dirty from another owner — not absorbed, not touched.

**3 — Dumper/interface:** new pure `pet/fullevent_dump_contract.py` — G2 schema gate (`petSchemaVersion=g2-fullevent-v1`, `hasFullEventSchema=1`, `fullPhaseSpace=1`; old/recoil fail closed), strict complete manifest, 3-inventory alignment + view/time vector-length + per-inventory identity/order hashes, forbidden-purity-fallback, transactional temp + atomic rename. `dump_pointcloud_inputs.py` gates on it (default G2; **PyROOT G2 read marked RUNTIME-BLOCKED**; recoil dump only via `--legacy-recoil-crosscheck`, tagged non-G2). Generator labels stay audit-only. Login-safe fake tests cover schema rejection, missing/tampered background, identity/order mismatch, vector-length mismatch, interrupted output (no partial), forbidden purity fallback.

**4 — Launcher audit (verified, not blindly replaced):** confirmed `sbatch_pet_nominal_bkgsub.sh` (+ bootstrap launchers) route through the recoil loader `minerva_pet_dataloader.py` → quarantined cross-check, not publication; no full-event publication launcher exists yet. Added `assert_publication_config` (no-GPU dry-run gate requiring `pet-fullevent-fps-v1` + `negweight-refined` + G2 markers + background; aborts recoil/purity/xps2/reduced) + tests, and a quarantine banner on the recoil launcher.

**Tests:** 35/35 ROOT-free PASS — `test_fullevent_fps` (25) + `test_fullevent_dump_contract` (10). The test-only binned Stay-Positive surrogate is explicitly labelled (production uses the trained `refine_stay_positive`).

**Docs:** `ND_OMNIFOLD_RUN_LOG.md`, `PET_P1_P5_SESSION_STATE.md`, `pet/FULL_EVENT_FEATURE_CONTRACT.md` (prior).

**Verdict: EVIDENCE-BLOCKED.** Named runtime blocker: Agent E's reviewed/built/smoke-validated G2 background-cloud ROOT `runEventLoopOmniFold_PC_FPS_MEFHC_bkgcloud.root` + an Agent-B-aligned full-schema NPZ carrying literal background clouds/scalars/`w_bkg`. No such evidence fabricated; PyROOT integration remains runtime-blocked, not passed.
